keyEvents.text: First Half begins.
Goal! Toronto FC 0, Columbus Crew 1. Wessam Abou Ali (Columbus Crew) header from the centre of the box to the top right corner. Assisted by Max Arfsten with a cross.
Andrés Herrera (Columbus Crew) is shown the yellow card for a bad foul.
Dylan Chambost (Columbus Crew) is shown the yellow card for a bad foul.
First Half ends, Toronto FC 0, Columbus Crew 1.
Substitution, Toronto FC. Djordje Mihailovic replaces Josh Sargent.
Second Half begins Toronto FC 0, Columbus Crew 1.
Goal! Toronto FC 1, Columbus Crew 1. José Cifuentes (Toronto FC) right footed shot from the centre of the box to the bottom right corner. Assisted by Dániel Sallói with a cross.
Substitution, Columbus Crew. Rudy Camacho replaces Dylan Chambost.
Substitution, Columbus Crew. Jamal Thiaré replaces Taha Habroune.
Substitution, Toronto FC. Malik Henry replaces José Cifuentes because of an injury.
Substitution, Toronto FC. Emilio Aristizábal replaces Deandre Kerr.
Substitution, Columbus Crew. Hugo Picard replaces Max Arfsten.
Goal! Toronto FC 2, Columbus Crew 1. Walker Zimmerman (Toronto FC) header from the centre of the box to the bottom left corner. Assisted by Djordje Mihailovic with a cross following a corner.
Walker Zimmerman (Toronto FC) is shown the yellow card for a bad foul.
Substitution, Columbus Crew. Sékou Bangoura replaces Diego Rossi.
Substitution, Columbus Crew. Nariman Akhundzada replaces André Gomes.
Substitution, Toronto FC. Zane Monlouis replaces Alonso Coello.
Jamal Thiaré (Columbus Crew) is shown the yellow card for a bad foul.
Second Half ends, Toronto FC 2, Columbus Crew 1.
